figure.title: Connection Establishment - Concurrent Initiation
figure.purpose: Shows the connection establishment sequence where both the Originator and Completer initiate the connection concurrently.

technical_summary: Originator asserts OrigClkReq and Completer asserts CompClkReq concurrently.
Completer asserts CompClkAck in response to OrigClkReq.
Originator asserts OrigClkAck in response to CompClkReq.
Each side can begin issuing credits once their respective Ack is received.
The interface becomes fully connected once credits are exchanged in both directions.

critical_facts: The connection handshake signals are completely independent, allowing for concurrent initialization without race conditions.
